calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge.
Petitioner: Isheal Martin Jr., present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Athena Tomiko Searles, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Athena Tomiko Martin.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-31-2007 Off Calendar

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-05-2007 Reset To May-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of THREE Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Isheal Martin Jr., present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Athena Tomiko Searles, was sworn and examined.
Service on Notice to the Minor's Mother was not timely served.
Matter is continued to May 31, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to file an Amended OSC and re-serve the Minor's Mother of the new hearing date by U.S. Mail.
The Court waived re-publication process of the Amended OSC.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the minor were made at the hearing.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Petitioner: Isheal Martin Jr., present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Athena Tomiko Searles, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Defective Proof of Service on Notice for OSC to the Minor's Mother received in court.
Matter is continued to Apr. 5, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to re-serve the notice of the new OSC hearing date and file proof of service with the court.
